title: `_pyrepl._minimal_curses.tigetstr` segfaults
author: devdanzin
body:
This is the same issue as https://github.com/python/cpython/issues/126456, just reporting so you can apply the fix to PyPy before the next sync with `_pyrepl`.

Found using fusil by @vstinner.

comments.author: mattip
comments.body: Do we ever use `lib_pypy.pyrepl._minimal_curses`? I thought we always use the builtin `_minimal_curses` instead.
